subcodes.first_line: O daughter of My Name Most Truthful, and consort of My servant, the Noble One! Hearken unto the Voice of the Wronged One, and hold fast unto that which today [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بنت اسمی اصدق و ضلع عبدی کریم بشنو ندای مظلوم را و تمسک نما بانچه که الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
